name: Discord Signal Tollbooth
description: Paid Discord signal command using receipt-gated access and visible fee waterfalls.
degenPitch: Discord alpha with receipts, not random paywall chaos.
whatItDoes: Quotes paid access from a Discord command.
Verifies receipt before returning signal content.
Supports builder fees in the visible fee waterfall.
cursorPrompt: Build a Discord Signal Tollbooth using DNA x402. Gate signal commands behind quote, commit, finalize, receipt verification, and paid retry. Do not hold private keys in the bot.
suggestedPrompt: Build a Discord Signal Tollbooth using DNA x402. Gate signal commands behind quote, commit, finalize, receipt verification, and paid retry. Do not hold private keys in the bot.
